name: Harry Potter Audio fMRI
description: fMRI from 8 participants listening to a chapter of 'Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone' (~45 min), shared on Dryad. A naturalistic language comprehension dataset linking word-by-word narrative features to brain activity.
citation: Wehbe L, et al. (2014). Simultaneously uncovering the patterns of brain regions involved in different story reading subprocesses. PLOS ONE, 9(11), e112575.
